PreToolUse.command: if [[ "$TOOL_INPUT_FILE_PATH" == *"schema.ts"* ]]; then echo '{"systemMessage": "⚠️ Modifying schema.ts — run: pnpm db:generate && pnpm db:push after changes"}'; fi
PreToolUse.windows: if ($env:TOOL_INPUT_FILE_PATH -like '*schema.ts') { Write-Output '{"systemMessage": "⚠️ Modifying schema.ts — run: pnpm db:generate && pnpm db:push after changes"}' }
